title: Senior Finance Executive (Accounts Payable)
description:
Senior Finance Executive (Accounts Payable)

📍 MapleTree Business City (Labrador Park) | 🕒 11-months Contract

My client is looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Senior Finance Executive to join our Finance team on an 11-month contract. This role plays a key part in ensuring timely, accurate vendor payments while maintaining strong internal controls and supporting finance operations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Review and verify vendors’ invoices to ensure compliance with internal controls, policies, and procedures

  • Process invoices accurately and on time in accordance with service level agreements (SLAs)

  • Verify employee expense claims to ensure proper documentation, approvals, and compliance with internal policies

  • Liaise with internal stakeholders and claimants to resolve discrepancies efficiently

  • Support month-end and year-end closing activities, including accruals, reconciliations, reporting, and audit schedule preparation

  • Participate in finance-related projects such as process automation and system enhancements

  • Assist with internal and external audits

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams and support ad-hoc finance duties as required

Requirements

  • Degree in Accountancy or related discipline

  • At least 5 years of relevant Accounts Payable or Finance experience

  • Familiarity with Workday is an added advantage

  • Strong data analytics skills will be highly valued

  • Excellent communication, writing, and presentation skills

  • Meticulous, well-organised, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

  • Positive working attitude and a strong team player

Why Join Us

  • Opportunity to be part of a collaborative and dynamic Finance team

  • Exposure to finance transformation, automation, and process improvements

  • Valuable experience within a structured, well-governed organisation

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Justin Lee

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
